pokemon:crobat.name: Crobat
pokemon:crobat.summary: Crobat sneaks up on its intended prey using wings that barely make a sound. This Pokémon rests by hanging on a tree branch with its rear legs that serve as wings.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Crobat sneaks up on its intended prey using wings that barely make a sound. This Pokémon rests by hanging on a tree branch with its rear legs that serve as wings.
The transformation of its legs into wings made it better at flying, but more clumsy at walking.
Having four wings allows it to fly more quickly and quietly so it can sneak up on prey without its noticing.
As a result of its pursuit of faster, yet more silent flight, a new set of wings grew on its hind legs.
Having four wings enables it to fly faster and more quietly. It turns active when the night comes.
Over the course of evolution, its hind legs turned into wings. By alternately resting its front and rear wings, it can fly all day without having to stop.
The development of wings on its legs enables it to fly fast but also makes it tough to stop and rest.
It flies so si­ lently through the dark on its four wings that it may not be noticed even when nearby.
It flies so silently through the dark on its four wings that it may not be noticed even when nearby.
It flies so silently through the dark on its four wings that it may not be noticed even when nearby.
Its hind limbs have become another set of wings. Crobat expertly maneuvers its four wings to dart in exquisite fashion through even the most confined caves without losing any speed.
Silent and swift in its four-winged flight, it bites down on its prey before they realize what’s happening. In a heartbeat, it drains their blood.
If this Pokémon is flying by fluttering only a pair of wings on either the forelegs or hind legs, it’s proof that Crobat has been flying a long distance. It switches the wings it uses if it is tired.
A Pokémon that gained vastly enhanced flying performance by having its legs turn into wings.
The transformation of its legs into wings made it better at flying, but more clumsy at walking.
If this POKéMON is flying by fluttering only a pair of wings on either the forelegs or hind legs, it’s proof that CROBAT has been flying a long distance. It switches the wings it uses if it is tired.
CROBAT sneaks up on its intended prey using wings that barely make a sound. This POKéMON rests by hanging on a tree branch with its rear legs that serve as wings.
This Pokémon flaps its four wings skillfully. Crobat can fly through cramped caves without needing to slow down.
The development of wings on its legs enables it to fly fast but also makes it tough to stop and rest.
The development of wings on its legs enables it to fly fast but also makes it tough to stop and rest.
Both its legs became wings, and as a result, it can’t move well on the ground. All it can do is crawl around.
Both of its legs have turned into wings. Without a sound, Crobat flies swiftly toward its prey and sinks its fangs into the nape of its target’s neck.
It feeds on the blood of living people and Pokémon. If it can’t drink any blood for even a short while, it becomes weak and unable to fly.
Its fangs are so sharp, if it bites you in the dark and sucks your blood, you won’t notice any pain or realize you’ve been bitten.
The transformation of its legs into wings made it better at flying, but more clumsy at walking.
Having four wings allows it to fly more quickly and quietly so it can sneak up on prey without its noticing.
It flies so silently through the dark on its four wings that it may not be noticed even when nearby.
Having four wings allows it to fly more quickly and quietly so it can sneak up on prey without its noticing.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Crobat sneaks up on its intended prey using wings that barely make a sound. This Pokémon rests by hanging on a tree branch with its rear legs that serve as wings.

pokemon:golbat.name: Golbat
pokemon:golbat.summary: Golbat bites down on prey with its four fangs and drinks the victim’s blood. It becomes active on inky dark moonless nights, flying around to attack people and Pokémon.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Golbat bites down on prey with its four fangs and drinks the victim’s blood. It becomes active on inky dark moonless nights, flying around to attack people and Pokémon.
Its sharp fangs puncture the toughest of hides and have small holes for greedily sucking blood.
Flitting around in the dead of night, it sinks its fangs into its prey and drains a nearly fatal amount of blood.
Once it strikes, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it gets too heavy to fly.
When it plunges its fangs into its prey, it instantly draws and gulps down more than ten ounces of blood.
It loves the blood of humans and Pokémon. It flies around at night in search of neck veins.
Its fangs easily puncture even thick animal hide. It loves to feast on the blood of people and POKéMON. It flits about in darkness and strikes from behind.
It clamps down on its prey with needle- sharp fangs and drains over 10 ounces of blood in one gulp.
However hard its victim's hide may be, it punctures with sharp fangs and gorges itself with blood.
However hard its victim’s hide may be, it punctures with sharp fangs and gorges itself with blood.
Once it bites, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it gets too heavy to fly.
It sinks its sharp fangs into other creatures and slurps up their blood. A closer look at the fangs reveals that they are hollow and akin to straws.
It attacks in a stealthy manner, without warning. Its sharp fangs are used to bite and to suck blood.
It attacks in a stealthy manner, without warning. Its sharp fangs are used to bite and to suck blood.
Sometimes they drink so much blood, they can’t fly anymore. Then they fall to the ground and become food for other Pokémon.
Golbat loves to drink the blood of living things. It is particularly active in the pitch black of night. This Pokémon flits around in the night skies, seeking fresh blood.
Once it starts sucking blood, it does not stop until it is full. It flies at night in search of prey.
Its sharp fangs puncture the toughest of hides and have small holes for greedily sucking blood.
Once it strikes, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it gets too heavy to fly.
GOLBAT loves to drink the blood of living things. It is particularly active in the pitch black of night. This POKéMON flits around in the night skies, seeking fresh blood.
GOLBAT bites down on prey with its four fangs and drinks the victim’s blood. It becomes active on inky dark moonless nights, flying around to attack people and POKéMON.
Its feet are tiny, but this Pokémon walks skillfully. It sneaks up on sleeping prey before sinking in its fangs and slurping up blood.
It can drink more than 10 ounces of blood at once. If it has too much, it gets heavy and flies clumsily.
It can drink more than 10 ounces of blood at once. If it has too much, it gets heavy and flies clumsily.
Its thick fangs are hollow like straws, making them unexpectedly fragile. These fangs are specialized for sucking blood.
It loves to drink other creatures’ blood. It’s said that if it finds others of its kind going hungry, it sometimes shares the blood it’s gathered.
They can suck down over 10 ounces of blood in one go. They have been known to drink so much blood that they can no longer fly.
Every once in a while, you’ll see a Golbat that’s missing some fangs. This happens when hunger drives it to try biting a Steel-type Pokémon.
Its sharp fangs puncture the toughest of hides and have small holes for greedily sucking blood.
Flitting around in the dead of night, it sinks its fangs into its prey and drains a nearly fatal amount of blood.
Once it bites, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it gets too heavy to fly.
Once it starts sucking blood, it does not stop until it is full. It flies at night in search of prey.
It attacks in a stealthy manner, without warning. Its sharp fangs are used to bite and suck blood.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Golbat bites down on prey with its four fangs and drinks the victim’s blood. It becomes active on inky dark moonless nights, flying around to attack people and Pokémon.

pokemon:zubat.name: Zubat
pokemon:zubat.summary: Zubat avoids sunlight because exposure causes it to become unhealthy. During the daytime, it stays in caves or under the eaves of old houses, sleeping while hanging upside down.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Zubat avoids sunlight because exposure causes it to become unhealthy. During the daytime, it stays in caves or under the eaves of old houses, sleeping while hanging upside down.
It checks its surroundings and location using reflections of the ultrasonic waves from its mouth.
It does not need eyes, because it emits ultrasonic waves to check its surroundings while it flies.
Forms colonies in perpetually dark places. Uses ultrasonic waves to identify and approach targets.
During the day, it gathers with others and hangs from the ceilings of old buildings and caves.
Even though it has no eyes, it can sense obstacles using ultrasonic waves it emits from its mouth.
While living in pitch-black caverns, their eyes gradually grew shut and deprived them of vision. They use ultrasonic waves to detect obstacles.
It has no eyes. Instead, it relies on its ultrasonic cries for echo location to flit about in darkness.
While flying, it constantly emits ultrasonic waves from its mouth to check its sur­ roundings.
While flying, it constantly emits ultrasonic waves from its mouth to check its surroundings.
It forms colonies in perpetually dark places and uses ultrasonic waves to identify and approach targets.
Makes its home in gloomy caves. Atrophied eyes have left this Pokémon blind, so it scans its surroundings via sound waves that it emits from its mouth as it flies.
Emits ultrasonic cries while it flies. They act as a sonar used to check for objects in its way.
Emits ultrasonic cries while it flies. They act as a sonar used to check for objects in its way.
When exposed to sunlight, they suffer burns. The frequency of their ultrasonic waves can differ slightly from colony to colony.
Zubat remains quietly unmoving in a dark spot during the bright daylight hours. It does so because prolonged exposure to the sun causes its body to become slightly burned.
Disliking sunlight, it sleeps deep in forests and caves until sundown.
It checks its surroundings and location using reflections of the ultrasonic waves from its mouth.
Forms colonies in perpetually dark places. Uses ultrasonic waves to identify and approach targets.
ZUBAT remains quietly unmoving in a dark spot during the bright daylight hours. It does so because prolonged exposure to the sun causes its body to become slightly burned.
ZUBAT avoids sunlight because exposure causes it to become unhealthy. During the daytime, it stays in caves or under the eaves of old houses, sleeping while hanging upside down.
Zubat live in caves, down where the sun’s light won’t reach. In the morning, they gather together to keep each other warm as they sleep.
Capable of flying safely in dark places, it emits ultrasonic cries to check for any obstacles.
Capable of flying safely in dark places, it emits ultrasonic cries to check for any obstacles.
It sleeps in caves during the day. It has no eyes, so to check its surroundings while flying, it emits ultrasonic waves.
It emits ultrasonic waves from its mouth to check its surroundings. Even in tight caves, Zubat flies around with skill.
Their skin is so thin that they’ll be burned if sunlight hits them. When it gets cold out, they gather together to warm one another’s bodies.
It has no eyeballs, so it can’t see. It checks its surroundings via the ultrasonic waves it emits from its mouth.
It checks its surroundings and location using reflections of the ultrasonic waves from its mouth.
It does not need eyes, because it emits ultrasonic waves to check its surroundings while it flies.
Even though it has no eyes, it can sense obstacles using ultrasonic waves it emits from its mouth.
It has no eyes. Instead, it relies on its ultrasonic cries for echolocation to flit about in darkness.
Emits ultrasonic cries while it flies. They act as a sonar used to check for ob­ jects in its way.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Zubat avoids sunlight because exposure causes it to become unhealthy. During the daytime, it stays in caves or under the eaves of old houses, sleeping while hanging upside down.
